reviews.review_msg: Could not ask for a funnier, smarter, or more understanding professor! Make sure you do all the reading/translations, and remember that participation matters.

Truly no one is doing it like Matt. He is the funniest, warmest, most engaging professor I've ever had. He is tough but fair when grading essays, and very kind & accommodating. He loves his students so much and wants nothing but the best for them; he creates such a supportive environment. SFU is lucky to have him.

I've taken 4 courses with Matt so far, and they have all been amazing. He's one of the best profs I have ever had. Everyone says how tough a marker he is, and that's true but he's so willing to help you, and his feedback is always great. Definitely recommend his classes but for students who are passionate enough and willing to put in the work.
